_comment: NEGATIVE fixture: the over-corrected/complacent failure mode for pr-regression-introduces-exec. It sees the exec sink but rates it info, so the grader MUST fail it (require_finding wants >= high at the sink file). The skill-eval Go test (TestSkillGradeGoldensAndNegative) asserts this failure — proving the grader has teeth.

findings.title: build generateBody runs a command; probably fine
findings.description: There is an exec.Command here, but recipes are config-sourced so it is likely safe.
